auto_disabled.description: True when the feature was switched off automatically because the EMA score dropped below the threshold.

debug_enabled.description: True when the rich grid debug overlay is rendered on the output stream.

enabled.description: True when grid detection and viewport-based counting are enabled.

score.description: Current EMA grid quality score in the 0..1 range, or null before the first processed frame.

score_threshold.description: EMA score threshold that auto-disables the grid feature. 0 disables auto-off.

get.summary: Get the current grid feature state.

debug_enabled.description: Enable the rich grid debug overlay with raw, accumulated, rejected, predicted, and accepted lines.

enabled.description: Enable grid detection, grid overlay, and viewport-based counting.

score_threshold.description: EMA grid score threshold that auto-disables the grid feature. Use 0 to disable auto-off.

200.description: List of model files and their TensorRT engines

task.description: Saved Ultralytics task override for this model. Null for non-UL models.

grid_count_enabled.description: Optional initial grid feature state. When enabled, grid detection runs and counting is limited to the detected viewport.

grid_debug_enabled.description: Optional initial grid debug overlay state.

grid_score_threshold.description: Optional EMA grid score threshold used to auto-disable the grid feature. Use 0 to disable auto-off.

model_task.description: Optional Ultralytics task override. When omitted, the saved catalog setting is used and defaults to segment.
